title: riedlea hirsuta
intro: Riedlea hirsuta, also known as hairy riedlea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Riedlea hirsuta are said to include relief from pain, reduction in inflammation, and improved immune function. Riedlea hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
